# Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange in Perl

Here's a complete example of the Diffie-Hellman key exchange algorithm implemented in Perl:

```perl
#!/usr/bin/perl
use strict;
use warnings;
use Math::BigInt;

# Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange Implementation
sub diffie_hellman_key_exchange {
    # Prime number (large prime, commonly used in DH)
    my $p = Math::BigInt->new("
